packages.title: Capital, Crown & Kashmir
packages.shortDescription: Explore Delhi, Agra, and Kashmir in one unforgettable journey through history and snow-clad valleys.

packages.title: Kerala Backwaters Bliss
packages.shortDescription: Cruise tranquil backwaters, sip cardamom tea on misty hills, and unwind in God's own country.

packages.title: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey
packages.shortDescription: Live like royalty across pink cities, blue alleys, golden dunes, and shimmering lake palaces.
